metadata.description: Career roles seed data for the Philippine job market

roles.title: Software Engineer
roles.description: Designs, develops, and maintains software applications and systems. Writes clean, scalable code and collaborates with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality products.

roles.title: Backend Engineer
roles.description: Builds and maintains server-side application logic, APIs, and database integrations. Ensures system reliability, scalability, and performance.

roles.title: Frontend Engineer
roles.description: Develops user-facing web applications with modern JavaScript frameworks. Focuses on responsive design, accessibility, and optimal user experience.

roles.title: Full-Stack Engineer
roles.description: Develops both client-side and server-side software. Handles end-to-end feature development from database design to UI implementation.

roles.title: DevOps Engineer
roles.description: Bridges development and operations by automating infrastructure, managing CI/CD pipelines, and ensuring system reliability and scalability.

roles.title: QA Engineer
roles.description: Designs and executes test plans, identifies software defects, and ensures product quality through manual and automated testing methodologies.

roles.title: Mobile Developer
roles.description: Designs and builds mobile applications for iOS and/or Android platforms. Ensures smooth performance, responsiveness, and cross-platform compatibility.

roles.title: Data Engineer
roles.description: Builds and maintains data pipelines, ETL processes, and data warehouses. Ensures data availability, quality, and accessibility for analytics and machine learning teams.

roles.title: Machine Learning Engineer
roles.description: Designs, builds, and deploys machine learning models into production systems. Bridges the gap between data science research and scalable engineering solutions.

roles.title: Platform Engineer
roles.description: Builds and maintains internal developer platforms, tooling, and infrastructure to improve developer productivity and system reliability.

roles.title: Data Analyst
roles.description: Collects, processes, and analyzes data to provide actionable business insights. Creates reports, dashboards, and visualizations to support decision-making.

roles.title: Data Scientist
roles.description: Applies statistical analysis, machine learning, and data mining to extract insights from complex datasets. Builds predictive models and communicates findings to stakeholders.

roles.title: BI Analyst
roles.description: Develops and maintains BI solutions including dashboards, reports, and data models. Translates business requirements into data-driven insights and recommendations.

roles.title: Analytics Engineer
roles.description: Bridges the gap between data engineering and data analysis. Builds and maintains analytics infrastructure, data models, and transformation pipelines for self-serve analytics.

roles.title: UI/UX Designer
roles.description: Designs intuitive and visually appealing user interfaces and experiences. Conducts user research, creates wireframes, prototypes, and design systems.

roles.title: Product Designer
roles.description: Owns end-to-end product design from research to high-fidelity mockups. Works closely with product managers and engineers to shape product strategy and user experience.

roles.title: UX Researcher
roles.description: Plans and conducts qualitative and quantitative user research studies to inform product decisions. Synthesizes findings into actionable insights for design and product teams.

roles.title: Product Manager
roles.description: Defines product vision, strategy, and roadmap. Prioritizes features based on user needs, business goals, and technical feasibility. Coordinates cross-functional teams to deliver value.

roles.title: Product Owner
roles.description: Manages the product backlog, defines user stories, and ensures the development team delivers maximum value. Acts as the voice of the customer within scrum teams.

roles.title: Scrum Master
roles.description: Facilitates scrum ceremonies, removes impediments, and coaches teams on agile practices. Ensures the team follows scrum framework and continuously improves processes.

roles.title: Technical Program Manager
roles.description: Manages complex, cross-functional technical programs and initiatives. Coordinates multiple teams, manages dependencies, and drives programs from inception to delivery.

roles.title: Staff Accountant
roles.description: Prepares financial statements, maintains general ledger accounts, and assists with month-end closing. Ensures compliance with Philippine accounting standards (PFRS/PAS).

roles.title: Senior Accountant
roles.description: Supervises junior accountants, reviews financial statements, and manages complex accounting tasks. Ensures accuracy of financial records and compliance with tax regulations.

roles.title: Tax Analyst
roles.description: Prepares and reviews tax returns, ensures compliance with BIR regulations, and analyzes tax implications of business decisions. Monitors changes in Philippine tax law.

roles.title: Tax Consultant
roles.description: Advises clients on tax planning strategies, regulatory compliance, and optimization opportunities. Provides expertise on Philippine and international tax matters.

roles.title: Financial Analyst
roles.description: Analyzes financial data, prepares forecasts, and builds financial models to support business decisions. Evaluates investment opportunities and tracks financial performance.

roles.title: Audit Manager
roles.description: Plans and supervises internal or external audit engagements. Evaluates internal controls, identifies risks, and ensures compliance with Philippine auditing standards.

roles.title: Controller
roles.description: Oversees all accounting operations including financial reporting, budgeting, and internal controls. Manages the accounting team and ensures regulatory compliance.

roles.title: Chief Financial Officer
roles.description: Leads the financial strategy and operations of the organization. Oversees financial planning, risk management, fundraising, and investor relations.

roles.title: Bookkeeper
roles.description: Records daily financial transactions, maintains accounts payable/receivable, and assists in basic financial reporting. Ensures accuracy of financial records.

roles.title: System Administrator
roles.description: Installs, configures, and maintains servers, operating systems, and IT infrastructure. Monitors system performance and ensures uptime and security.

roles.title: Network Engineer
roles.description: Designs, implements, and manages computer networks including LAN, WAN, and wireless. Troubleshoots network issues and ensures optimal connectivity and security.

roles.title: Cloud Architect
roles.description: Designs and oversees cloud computing strategies and architectures. Evaluates cloud services, ensures scalability, security, and cost optimization of cloud infrastructure.

roles.title: Security Engineer
roles.description: Protects organizational systems and data from cyber threats. Implements security measures, conducts vulnerability assessments, and responds to security incidents.

roles.title: IT Manager
roles.description: Manages the IT department, oversees technology infrastructure, and aligns IT strategy with business goals. Manages vendor relationships and IT budgets.

roles.title: Database Administrator
roles.description: Manages, maintains, and optimizes database systems. Ensures data integrity, availability, and security. Handles backups, recovery, and performance tuning.

roles.title: Engineering Manager
roles.description: Leads and mentors engineering teams, manages technical roadmaps, and balances people management with technical decision-making. Drives engineering culture and hiring.

roles.title: VP of Engineering
roles.description: Sets engineering vision and strategy across the organization. Manages multiple engineering teams, drives technical excellence, and partners with C-suite on business strategy.

roles.title: Chief Technology Officer
roles.description: Defines the overall technology strategy and vision for the organization. Drives innovation, evaluates emerging technologies, and ensures alignment between technology and business goals.

roles.title: Director of Engineering
roles.description: Oversees multiple engineering teams and projects. Defines engineering processes, drives technical standards, and ensures delivery of business-critical initiatives.

roles.title: Team Lead
roles.description: Leads a small engineering team while remaining hands-on with code. Provides technical guidance, conducts code reviews, and coordinates sprint planning and delivery.

roles.title: Management Consultant
roles.description: Advises organizations on strategy, operations, and organizational effectiveness. Analyzes business challenges and develops data-driven recommendations for improvement.

roles.title: IT Consultant
roles.description: Advises organizations on technology strategy, system selection, and digital transformation. Evaluates IT infrastructure and recommends solutions aligned with business needs.

roles.title: ERP Consultant
roles.description: Implements and customizes Enterprise Resource Planning systems (SAP, Oracle, NetSuite). Maps business processes to ERP modules and trains end users.

roles.title: Technology Advisor
roles.description: Provides strategic technology guidance to senior leadership. Evaluates emerging technologies, advises on digital transformation initiatives, and helps align technology investments with business outcomes.

roles.title: BPO Team Lead
roles.description: Supervises a team of BPO agents, monitors performance metrics, and ensures SLA compliance. Handles escalations, coaching, and shift management in call center or back-office operations.

roles.title: Operations Manager
roles.description: Oversees daily business operations, manages multiple teams, and drives operational efficiency. Develops processes, manages budgets, and ensures quality standards are met.

roles.title: Customer Service Manager
roles.description: Manages customer service teams and operations. Develops service strategies, monitors customer satisfaction metrics, and implements process improvements for better customer experience.

roles.title: Quality Analyst
roles.description: Evaluates service quality in BPO operations through call monitoring, ticket auditing, and process reviews. Provides feedback and drives quality improvement initiatives.

roles.title: Digital Marketing Manager
roles.description: Plans and executes digital marketing campaigns across multiple channels. Manages marketing budgets, analyzes campaign performance, and drives customer acquisition and brand awareness.

roles.title: SEO Specialist
roles.description: Optimizes website content and structure for search engine visibility. Conducts keyword research, technical SEO audits, and link building strategies to improve organic rankings.

roles.title: Growth Hacker
roles.description: Drives rapid user and revenue growth through data-driven experimentation. Combines marketing, product, and engineering tactics to optimize acquisition, activation, and retention funnels.

roles.title: Content Strategist
roles.description: Develops and manages content strategies that align with business goals. Plans editorial calendars, oversees content creation, and measures content performance across channels.

roles.title: Senior Software Engineer
roles.description: Leads technical design and implementation of complex software systems. Mentors junior engineers, drives best practices, and makes architectural decisions for critical projects.

roles.title: Junior Software Developer
roles.description: Writes and maintains code under senior guidance. Learns development best practices, participates in code reviews, and contributes to feature development and bug fixes.

roles.title: Site Reliability Engineer
roles.description: Ensures the reliability, availability, and performance of production systems. Applies software engineering practices to infrastructure and operations challenges.

roles.title: Senior Data Analyst
roles.description: Leads data analysis projects, develops advanced analytical models, and mentors junior analysts. Presents strategic insights to senior leadership and drives data-informed decision-making.

roles.title: Internal Auditor
roles.description: Conducts internal audit engagements to evaluate the effectiveness of internal controls, risk management, and governance processes. Prepares audit reports with findings and recommendations.

roles.title: Accounts Payable Specialist
roles.description: Processes vendor invoices, manages payment schedules, and reconciles accounts payable records. Ensures accurate and timely payments while maintaining strong vendor relationships.

roles.title: Senior UI/UX Designer
roles.description: Leads design initiatives, establishes design systems, and mentors junior designers. Drives user-centered design across products while collaborating with product and engineering leadership.

roles.title: BPO Operations Supervisor
roles.description: Oversees day-to-day BPO operations, manages team leads, and ensures adherence to client SLAs. Handles workforce scheduling, performance reporting, and client communications.

roles.title: Workforce Analyst
roles.description: Forecasts call/transaction volumes, creates staffing schedules, and monitors real-time adherence. Optimizes workforce allocation to meet service level targets in BPO environments.

roles.title: Social Media Manager
roles.description: Manages social media presence across platforms including Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn. Creates content calendars, engages with audiences, and tracks social media KPIs.

roles.title: Email Marketing Specialist
roles.description: Designs, executes, and optimizes email marketing campaigns. Manages subscriber lists, creates automation workflows, and analyzes email performance metrics to drive engagement and conversions.

roles.title: Senior Product Manager
roles.description: Leads product strategy for major product lines or business units. Drives product vision, manages complex stakeholder relationships, and mentors junior product managers.

roles.title: Cloud Engineer
roles.description: Deploys, manages, and optimizes cloud infrastructure and services. Automates cloud provisioning, implements security best practices, and ensures cost-effective cloud utilization.

roles.title: IT Support Specialist
roles.description: Provides first and second-level technical support to end users. Troubleshoots hardware, software, and network issues. Manages help desk tickets and maintains IT documentation.

roles.title: AI Research Scientist
roles.description: Conducts original research in machine learning and artificial intelligence. Develops novel algorithms, publishes findings, and translates research into production-ready models.

roles.title: Account Executive
roles.description: Manages client accounts and drives revenue growth through relationship building and strategic selling. Identifies new business opportunities and ensures client satisfaction and retention.

roles.title: Account Manager
roles.description: Oversees a portfolio of client accounts, ensuring long-term satisfaction and revenue growth. Develops account strategies, manages renewals, and identifies upsell opportunities.

roles.title: Accountant
roles.description: Prepares and maintains financial records, ensures compliance with accounting standards, and produces financial reports. Handles journal entries, reconciliations, and tax filings.

roles.title: Accounting Clerk
roles.description: Performs routine accounting tasks including data entry, invoice processing, and bank reconciliations. Supports the accounting team with accurate record-keeping.

roles.title: Accounting Manager
roles.description: Manages the accounting department and oversees financial reporting, month-end close, and compliance. Leads accounting staff and ensures accuracy of financial statements.

roles.title: Administrative Assistant
roles.description: Provides administrative support including scheduling, correspondence, file management, and office coordination. Ensures smooth daily operations and supports team productivity.

roles.title: Agile Coach
roles.description: Guides teams and organizations in adopting and improving agile practices. Facilitates ceremonies, coaches team members, and helps remove impediments to agile transformation.

roles.title: Auditor
roles.description: Examines financial records and internal controls to ensure accuracy and regulatory compliance. Conducts audits, identifies risks, and recommends improvements to business processes.

roles.title: BI Developer
roles.description: Designs and develops business intelligence solutions including dashboards, reports, and data pipelines. Transforms raw data into actionable insights for business stakeholders.

roles.title: BI Manager
roles.description: Leads the business intelligence team and strategy. Oversees data warehouse architecture, reporting frameworks, and analytics delivery to drive data-informed decision-making across the organization.

roles.title: BPO Operations Manager
roles.description: Manages BPO operations including service delivery, team performance, and client satisfaction. Drives operational efficiency, manages SLAs, and leads process improvement initiatives.

roles.title: BPO Team Leader
roles.description: Leads a BPO team to meet performance targets and service quality standards. Coaches agents, monitors KPIs, handles escalations, and drives team engagement.

roles.title: Backend Developer
roles.description: Builds and maintains server-side applications, APIs, and database integrations. Writes clean, performant code and ensures system reliability and scalability.

roles.title: Business Analyst
roles.description: Bridges business needs and technical solutions by gathering requirements, analyzing processes, and defining specifications. Creates documentation and ensures solutions meet stakeholder expectations.

roles.title: CFO
roles.description: Leads the finance organization and sets financial strategy. Oversees financial planning, capital allocation, investor relations, and ensures the company's long-term financial health.

roles.title: CHRO
roles.description: Leads the entire human resources function as a C-suite executive. Sets people strategy, drives culture, oversees talent acquisition and development, and ensures HR supports business growth.

roles.title: CISO
roles.description: Leads the organization's information security strategy as a C-suite executive. Oversees security operations, compliance, risk management, and incident response across the enterprise.

roles.title: CMO
roles.description: Leads the marketing organization and sets brand and growth strategy. Oversees all marketing channels, brand positioning, demand generation, and marketing technology investments.

roles.title: CPO
roles.description: Leads the product organization as a C-suite executive. Sets product vision and strategy, aligns product roadmap with business goals, and drives product-led growth.

roles.title: CTO
roles.description: Sets the technology vision and strategy for the organization. Leads engineering teams, makes architecture decisions, manages technical debt, and ensures technology drives business growth.

roles.title: Compliance Officer
roles.description: Ensures organizational compliance with laws, regulations, and internal policies. Develops compliance programs, conducts risk assessments, and provides regulatory guidance.

roles.title: Customer Service Representative
roles.description: Handles customer inquiries and complaints via phone, email, and chat. Resolves issues, processes orders, and ensures customer satisfaction while meeting KPI targets in a fast-paced BPO environment.

roles.title: Customer Success Manager
roles.description: Ensures customers achieve their desired outcomes using the company's products. Builds relationships, drives adoption, reduces churn, and identifies expansion opportunities.

roles.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
roles.description: Monitors and protects systems from cyber threats. Analyzes security alerts, investigates incidents, maintains security tools, and helps implement security policies.

roles.title: Cybersecurity Engineer
roles.description: Designs and implements security solutions to protect systems, networks, and data. Conducts vulnerability assessments, builds security tools, and responds to security incidents.

roles.title: Data Architect
roles.description: Designs enterprise data architecture including data models, data flows, and integration patterns. Defines standards for data storage, access, and governance across the organization.

roles.title: Data Engineering Manager
roles.description: Leads data engineering teams and oversees the design and maintenance of data infrastructure. Sets technical direction for data pipelines, platforms, and tooling.

roles.title: Design Lead
roles.description: Leads a team of designers and sets design direction for products. Establishes design systems, reviews work quality, and ensures designs meet user needs and business objectives.

roles.title: Developer Advocate
roles.description: Bridges the gap between developer communities and the company's products. Creates technical content, speaks at conferences, builds demos, and gathers developer feedback to improve products.

roles.title: Digital Marketing Specialist
roles.description: Plans and executes digital marketing campaigns across channels including social media, email, SEO, and paid advertising. Analyzes campaign performance and optimizes for ROI.

roles.title: Director of Marketing
roles.description: Directs the marketing department and sets marketing strategy. Oversees brand, demand generation, content, and digital marketing while managing budgets and team performance.

roles.title: Director of Product
roles.description: Directs multiple product teams and sets product strategy for a product line or business unit. Aligns product roadmaps with company vision and manages product team performance.

roles.title: Director of Sales
roles.description: Directs the sales organization and sets revenue strategy. Builds and manages sales teams, sets quotas, develops sales processes, and drives revenue growth across the company.

roles.title: Enterprise Architect
roles.description: Defines the overall IT architecture strategy aligned with business goals. Creates blueprints for systems integration, technology standards, and modernization roadmaps.

roles.title: Executive Assistant
roles.description: Provides high-level administrative support to senior executives. Manages complex calendars, coordinates meetings, prepares reports, and handles confidential information with discretion.

roles.title: FP&A Manager
roles.description: Leads financial planning and analysis, building forecasts, budgets, and financial models. Provides strategic financial insights to leadership for data-driven decision-making.

roles.title: FinTech Operations Manager
roles.description: Manages operations for a financial technology company including payment processing, compliance, and customer operations. Ensures operational efficiency and regulatory compliance.

roles.title: FinTech Product Manager
roles.description: Manages fintech products including digital payments, lending platforms, or investment tools. Balances user needs, regulatory compliance, and business goals in the financial technology space.

roles.title: Finance Manager
roles.description: Oversees financial operations including budgeting, reporting, and cash flow management. Manages the finance team and provides financial guidance to business leaders.

roles.title: Frontend Developer
roles.description: Develops user-facing web applications with modern JavaScript frameworks. Focuses on responsive design, accessibility, and optimal user experience.

roles.title: Full-Stack Developer
roles.description: Builds complete web applications handling both frontend and backend development. Works across the entire stack from user interface to database and deployment.

roles.title: Graphic Designer
roles.description: Creates visual content for marketing, branding, and digital platforms. Designs graphics, layouts, and illustrations that communicate brand identity and engage target audiences.

roles.title: HR Coordinator
roles.description: Supports HR operations including recruitment coordination, onboarding, benefits administration, and employee records management. Serves as the first point of contact for HR inquiries.

roles.title: HR Director
roles.description: Leads the HR function and develops people strategies aligned with business objectives. Oversees talent acquisition, employee engagement, compensation, and organizational development.

roles.title: HR Manager
roles.description: Manages HR operations and leads the HR team. Oversees recruitment, employee relations, performance management, and ensures compliance with labor laws and company policies.

roles.title: HR Specialist
roles.description: Handles specialized HR functions such as recruitment, benefits administration, or employee relations. Implements HR policies and provides guidance to employees and managers.

roles.title: Head of Data Engineering
roles.description: Directs the data engineering organization and sets the technical strategy for data infrastructure. Oversees data platform architecture, team growth, and cross-functional data initiatives.

roles.title: Head of Data Science
roles.description: Directs the data science function and sets the analytics strategy. Builds and leads high-performing teams, defines ML/AI roadmaps, and ensures data science delivers measurable business impact.

roles.title: Head of Design
roles.description: Oversees the entire design organization and sets the design vision. Defines design culture, hires and develops talent, and ensures design excellence across all products and touchpoints.

roles.title: IT Project Manager
roles.description: Manages IT projects from initiation through delivery. Coordinates cross-functional teams, manages budgets and timelines, and ensures projects meet business requirements and quality standards.

roles.title: IT Service Manager
roles.description: Manages IT service delivery and ensures IT services meet business needs. Oversees incident management, service level agreements, and continuous service improvement.

roles.title: Infrastructure Architect
roles.description: Designs and plans enterprise infrastructure including cloud, networking, and compute resources. Ensures systems meet performance, security, and scalability requirements.

roles.title: Investment Analyst
roles.description: Researches and analyzes investment opportunities including stocks, bonds, and alternative assets. Builds financial models, prepares investment recommendations, and monitors portfolio performance.

roles.title: Junior Accountant
roles.description: Assists in preparing financial records and reports under senior guidance. Handles data entry, reconciliations, and basic bookkeeping while learning accounting principles.

roles.title: Junior Backend Developer
roles.description: Assists in building server-side applications and APIs under senior guidance. Learns backend development practices, writes code, fixes bugs, and participates in code reviews.

roles.title: Junior Cybersecurity Analyst
roles.description: Supports the security team by monitoring alerts, triaging incidents, and maintaining security documentation. Learns cybersecurity tools and practices under senior guidance.

roles.title: Junior Data Analyst
roles.description: Assists in analyzing data and generating reports under senior guidance. Cleans datasets, creates basic visualizations, and supports the analytics team with ad-hoc queries.

roles.title: Junior DevOps Engineer
roles.description: Supports CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure automation, and deployment processes. Learns DevOps practices while assisting with monitoring, scripting, and cloud resource management.

roles.title: Junior Frontend Developer
roles.description: Builds user interfaces for web applications under senior guidance. Implements designs in HTML/CSS/JavaScript and learns modern frontend frameworks and best practices.

roles.title: Junior Product Manager
roles.description: Assists in product management under senior guidance. Helps with user research, feature specifications, backlog grooming, and stakeholder communication while learning product craft.

roles.title: Junior Project Manager
roles.description: Assists in managing projects under senior guidance. Coordinates tasks, tracks progress, communicates with stakeholders, and learns project management methodologies.

roles.title: Junior QA Engineer
roles.description: Assists in software testing by executing test cases, reporting bugs, and verifying fixes. Learns quality assurance methodologies and testing tools under senior guidance.

roles.title: Junior UI/UX Designer
roles.description: Supports the design team by creating wireframes, mockups, and prototypes. Assists with user research, design system maintenance, and visual design under senior guidance.

roles.title: Junior Web Developer
roles.description: Develops and maintains websites and web applications under senior guidance. Builds pages, fixes bugs, and learns full-stack web development practices.

roles.title: Lead Data Scientist
roles.description: Leads a team of data scientists and drives the data science roadmap. Oversees model development, sets best practices, and ensures data science projects deliver measurable business value.

roles.title: ML Engineer
roles.description: Builds and deploys machine learning models into production systems. Designs ML pipelines, optimizes model performance, and bridges the gap between data science and engineering.

roles.title: MLOps Engineer
roles.description: Builds and maintains the infrastructure for deploying, monitoring, and scaling machine learning models. Automates ML pipelines and ensures model reliability in production.

roles.title: Manual QA Tester
roles.description: Executes manual test cases to verify software quality. Identifies bugs, documents defects, performs regression testing, and ensures features meet acceptance criteria.

roles.title: Marketing Analyst
roles.description: Analyzes marketing data to measure campaign effectiveness and identify growth opportunities. Builds dashboards, generates insights, and supports data-driven marketing decisions.

roles.title: Marketing Coordinator
roles.description: Supports marketing campaigns by coordinating logistics, managing content calendars, and assisting with event planning. Handles administrative marketing tasks and tracks campaign progress.

roles.title: Marketing Manager
roles.description: Plans and executes marketing campaigns to drive brand awareness and lead generation. Manages marketing budgets, coordinates teams, and measures campaign performance.

roles.title: Mobile Engineering Lead
roles.description: Leads a mobile engineering team and sets technical direction for mobile apps. Makes architecture decisions, ensures code quality, and drives mobile platform best practices.

roles.title: Office Manager
roles.description: Manages daily office operations including facilities, supplies, and administrative staff. Ensures a productive work environment and handles vendor relationships and office budgets.

roles.title: Operations Director
roles.description: Directs company-wide operations including process optimization, supply chain, and operational strategy. Drives efficiency, scalability, and alignment with business objectives.

roles.title: Payroll Specialist
roles.description: Processes employee payroll, ensures accurate compensation, and manages payroll taxes and deductions. Maintains payroll records and ensures compliance with labor regulations.

roles.title: Penetration Tester
roles.description: Conducts authorized security testing to identify vulnerabilities in systems, networks, and applications. Simulates attacks, documents findings, and provides remediation recommendations.

roles.title: Principal Engineer
roles.description: Provides the highest level of individual technical contribution across the engineering organization. Tackles the most complex problems, defines technical vision, and influences company-wide engineering decisions.

roles.title: Product Analyst
roles.description: Analyzes product usage data to generate insights that drive product decisions. Tracks key metrics, runs A/B tests, and helps product teams understand user behavior.

roles.title: Program Manager
roles.description: Manages large-scale programs consisting of multiple related projects. Coordinates cross-functional teams, manages dependencies, and ensures programs deliver strategic business outcomes.

roles.title: Project Manager
roles.description: Manages projects from initiation to completion, coordinating cross-functional teams to deliver on time and within budget. Handles scope, risk, and stakeholder communication.

roles.title: QA Automation Engineer
roles.description: Designs and implements automated test frameworks and scripts. Integrates automated tests into CI/CD pipelines and reduces manual testing effort while improving coverage.

roles.title: QA Manager
roles.description: Leads the quality assurance team and defines testing strategy. Oversees test planning, automation initiatives, and quality metrics to ensure product reliability and customer satisfaction.

roles.title: Quality Assurance Analyst
roles.description: Monitors and evaluates BPO agent performance through call monitoring, ticket audits, and quality scorecards. Identifies training gaps and drives process improvements to maintain service excellence.

roles.title: Sales Manager
roles.description: Leads and motivates a sales team to meet revenue targets. Develops sales strategies, manages pipelines, coaches representatives, and builds relationships with key accounts.

roles.title: Sales Representative
roles.description: Identifies and pursues sales opportunities through prospecting, demos, and relationship building. Manages the full sales cycle from lead generation to closing deals.

roles.title: Security Architect
roles.description: Designs and implements enterprise security architecture. Defines security standards, evaluates technologies, and ensures systems are built with security by design.

roles.title: Security Consultant
roles.description: Advises organizations on security strategy and helps implement security solutions. Conducts security assessments, develops security policies, and provides expert guidance on risk mitigation.

roles.title: Senior Auditor
roles.description: Leads audit engagements and supervises audit teams. Plans and executes complex audits, evaluates internal controls, and presents findings to management with actionable recommendations.

roles.title: Senior BI Developer
roles.description: Leads BI solution development including complex dashboards, data models, and ETL processes. Mentors junior developers and architects scalable business intelligence platforms.

roles.title: Senior Backend Developer
roles.description: Leads backend development of complex systems and APIs. Makes architecture decisions, mentors junior developers, and ensures code quality, scalability, and performance.

roles.title: Senior Business Analyst
roles.description: Leads business analysis for complex projects and initiatives. Defines requirements, models business processes, and ensures solutions align with strategic objectives. Mentors junior analysts.

roles.title: Senior Cybersecurity Analyst
roles.description: Leads security operations and threat analysis. Conducts advanced incident response, develops security strategies, and mentors junior analysts on emerging threats and defense techniques.

roles.title: Senior Data Engineer
roles.description: Designs and builds scalable data pipelines and infrastructure. Leads data platform architecture decisions, optimizes data processing, and mentors junior engineers.

roles.title: Senior Data Scientist
roles.description: Leads complex data science projects from problem framing through deployment. Builds predictive models, mentors junior scientists, and partners with stakeholders to solve high-impact business problems.

roles.title: Senior Database Administrator
roles.description: Manages and optimizes enterprise database systems for performance, availability, and security. Leads database architecture decisions, disaster recovery planning, and capacity management.

roles.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
roles.description: Leads DevOps practices and infrastructure automation. Designs CI/CD pipelines, manages cloud infrastructure, and drives reliability and deployment efficiency across teams.

roles.title: Senior Engineering Manager
roles.description: Manages multiple engineering teams and drives technical strategy. Balances people management with technical leadership, sets engineering standards, and aligns team output with business goals.

roles.title: Senior Financial Analyst
roles.description: Leads financial analysis and modeling for strategic initiatives. Builds complex financial models, prepares executive presentations, and provides insights that drive business decisions.

roles.title: Senior Frontend Developer
roles.description: Leads frontend development of complex web applications. Makes UI architecture decisions, ensures performance and accessibility, and mentors junior developers.

roles.title: Senior Full-Stack Developer
roles.description: Leads end-to-end development of web applications across frontend and backend. Makes architecture decisions, mentors developers, and delivers complex features independently.

roles.title: Senior Mobile Developer
roles.description: Leads mobile application development for iOS and/or Android platforms. Makes architectural decisions, optimizes app performance, and mentors junior mobile developers.

roles.title: Senior Network Engineer
roles.description: Designs and manages complex enterprise network infrastructure. Leads network architecture decisions, troubleshoots critical issues, and ensures network security and performance.

roles.title: Senior Project Manager
roles.description: Leads complex, high-impact projects and programs. Manages large budgets, coordinates multiple workstreams, and provides strategic project leadership to achieve business outcomes.

roles.title: Senior QA Engineer
roles.description: Leads quality assurance strategy and test architecture. Designs test frameworks, drives automation adoption, and ensures comprehensive test coverage across the product.

roles.title: Senior Software Developer
roles.description: Leads software development of complex features and systems. Makes design decisions, writes high-quality code, conducts code reviews, and mentors junior developers.

roles.title: Software Developer
roles.description: Designs, develops, and maintains software applications. Writes clean code, participates in code reviews, and collaborates with teams to deliver reliable software solutions.

roles.title: Solutions Architect
roles.description: Designs end-to-end technical solutions that meet business requirements. Evaluates technologies, creates architecture blueprints, and guides development teams through implementation.

roles.title: Staff Engineer
roles.description: Provides deep technical leadership across multiple teams and projects. Solves the hardest engineering problems, defines technical strategy, and raises the engineering bar organization-wide.

roles.title: Tax Accountant
roles.description: Prepares and files tax returns, ensures compliance with Philippine tax regulations, and minimizes tax liability. Handles BIR filings, tax planning, and audit support.

roles.title: Tax Manager
roles.description: Leads the tax function and ensures organization-wide tax compliance. Manages tax planning strategies, oversees tax filings, and represents the company in tax audits and regulatory matters.

roles.title: Tax Tech Consultant
roles.description: Combines tax expertise with technology to automate tax processes and implement tax software solutions. Advises on digital tax transformation and tax technology strategy.

roles.title: Technical Consultant
roles.description: Advises clients on technology solutions and system architecture. Translates business requirements into technical designs, leads implementations, and provides expert guidance on best practices.

roles.title: Technical Lead
roles.description: Leads a development team technically, making architecture and design decisions. Balances hands-on coding with mentoring, code reviews, and technical planning.

roles.title: Technical Support Specialist
roles.description: Provides technical assistance to customers and internal users. Troubleshoots hardware and software issues, manages support tickets, and documents solutions for knowledge bases.

roles.title: Technical Writer
roles.description: Creates clear, accurate technical documentation including API docs, user guides, and knowledge bases. Collaborates with engineers to make complex technical concepts accessible.

roles.title: VP of Finance
roles.description: Oversees all financial operations and strategy as a senior executive. Directs financial planning, treasury, accounting, and ensures financial sustainability and regulatory compliance.

roles.title: VP of Product
roles.description: Oversees the product function at the executive level. Defines product vision, aligns product strategy with company goals, and leads product leaders across the organization.

roles.title: Junior Data Scientist
roles.description: Assists in building statistical models and performing data analysis under senior guidance. Cleans data, runs experiments, and creates visualizations to support data-driven decisions.

roles.title: Data Governance Analyst
roles.description: Establishes and enforces data quality standards, policies, and procedures. Ensures compliance with data regulations and manages metadata across the organization.

roles.title: Database Administrator
roles.description: Manages and maintains database systems ensuring data integrity, availability, and performance. Handles backups, recovery, and optimization of database operations.

roles.title: AI Engineer
roles.description: Develops and deploys artificial intelligence solutions including NLP, computer vision, and recommendation systems. Bridges the gap between ML research and production systems.

roles.title: Software Architect
roles.description: Designs high-level software architecture and makes critical technology decisions. Defines system structure, patterns, and standards to ensure scalability and maintainability.

roles.title: DevSecOps Engineer
roles.description: Integrates security practices into the DevOps pipeline. Automates security testing, manages vulnerability scanning, and ensures secure CI/CD processes.

roles.title: Embedded Systems Engineer
roles.description: Develops software for embedded systems and IoT devices. Programs microcontrollers, designs firmware, and optimizes for constrained environments.

roles.title: Game Developer
roles.description: Designs and develops video games and interactive entertainment. Implements game mechanics, physics, AI, and rendering systems using game engines.

roles.title: Blockchain Developer
roles.description: Develops decentralized applications and smart contracts on blockchain platforms. Implements tokenomics, consensus mechanisms, and Web3 integrations.

roles.title: Automation Engineer
roles.description: Designs and implements automated testing frameworks and process automation solutions. Reduces manual effort through scripting and tool development.

roles.title: Cloud Solutions Architect
roles.description: Designs and implements cloud-based solutions aligned with business requirements. Creates reference architectures, selects services, and ensures cost optimization.

roles.title: Release Engineer
roles.description: Manages the software release process from build to deployment. Coordinates releases, maintains CI/CD pipelines, and ensures deployment reliability.

roles.title: Motion Designer
roles.description: Creates animated visual content for digital products, marketing, and media. Designs motion graphics, micro-interactions, and animated UI elements.

roles.title: Brand Designer
roles.description: Develops and maintains brand visual identity including logos, color systems, typography, and brand guidelines. Ensures brand consistency across all touchpoints.

roles.title: Content Designer
roles.description: Crafts user-facing content and microcopy for digital products. Works with UX teams to create clear, helpful, and consistent language across the product experience.

roles.title: Senior Financial Analyst
roles.description: Leads financial analysis and modeling for strategic business decisions. Mentors junior analysts, presents to leadership, and drives complex forecasting and valuation projects.

roles.title: Budget Analyst
roles.description: Develops, analyzes, and monitors organizational budgets. Prepares budget reports, tracks expenditures, and recommends resource allocation strategies.

roles.title: Risk Analyst
roles.description: Identifies, assesses, and monitors financial and operational risks. Builds risk models, conducts stress testing, and develops mitigation strategies.

roles.title: Credit Analyst
roles.description: Evaluates creditworthiness of individuals or organizations. Analyzes financial statements, credit data, and economic conditions to make lending recommendations.

roles.title: Treasury Analyst
roles.description: Manages cash flow, banking relationships, and investment portfolios. Monitors liquidity, executes foreign exchange transactions, and optimizes working capital.

roles.title: Recruiter
roles.description: Sources, screens, and hires talent for open positions. Manages the full recruitment lifecycle from job posting to offer acceptance.

roles.title: Senior Recruiter
roles.description: Leads recruitment for critical and senior-level positions. Develops sourcing strategies, manages stakeholder relationships, and mentors junior recruiters.

roles.title: HR Business Partner
roles.description: Strategic HR partner embedded within business units. Aligns HR practices with business objectives, handles employee relations, and drives organizational development.

roles.title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
roles.description: Develops and executes talent acquisition strategies. Builds talent pipelines, manages employer brand, and optimizes recruitment processes.

roles.title: Learning & Development Specialist
roles.description: Designs, delivers, and evaluates employee training programs. Conducts needs assessments, creates learning materials, and measures training effectiveness.

roles.title: Compensation & Benefits Specialist
roles.description: Manages employee compensation programs, benefits administration, and salary benchmarking. Ensures competitive and equitable pay structures.

roles.title: HR Generalist
roles.description: Handles a broad range of HR functions including recruitment, onboarding, employee relations, payroll, and policy administration.

roles.title: Sales Engineer
roles.description: Provides technical expertise during the sales process. Demonstrates products, designs solutions, and bridges technical requirements with business needs.

roles.title: Business Development Representative
roles.description: Generates new business opportunities through outbound prospecting. Qualifies leads, sets meetings, and builds the top of the sales pipeline.

roles.title: Key Account Manager
roles.description: Manages relationships with the organization's most important clients. Develops account strategies, identifies upsell opportunities, and ensures client retention.

roles.title: Sales Operations Analyst
roles.description: Optimizes sales processes through data analysis, CRM management, and reporting. Tracks pipeline metrics, forecasts revenue, and identifies process improvements.

roles.title: Regional Sales Manager
roles.description: Leads sales teams across a geographic region. Sets targets, develops strategies, manages key client relationships, and drives revenue growth.

roles.title: Inside Sales Representative
roles.description: Sells products and services remotely through phone, email, and video. Manages inbound leads, conducts demos, and closes deals without in-person meetings.

roles.title: Brand Manager
roles.description: Develops and executes brand strategies to build awareness and equity. Manages brand positioning, messaging, campaigns, and market research.

roles.title: Product Marketing Manager
roles.description: Positions and launches products in the market. Develops go-to-market strategies, competitive analysis, messaging, and sales enablement materials.

roles.title: Performance Marketing Manager
roles.description: Manages paid advertising campaigns across digital channels. Optimizes ROAS, manages budgets, and uses data to scale user acquisition.

roles.title: PR Specialist
roles.description: Manages public relations and media communications. Writes press releases, coordinates media outreach, and maintains the organization's public image.

roles.title: Legal Counsel
roles.description: Provides legal advice and representation for the organization. Reviews contracts, ensures regulatory compliance, and manages legal risks.

roles.title: Compliance Analyst
roles.description: Monitors and ensures organizational compliance with laws, regulations, and internal policies. Conducts audits, prepares reports, and recommends corrective actions.

roles.title: Data Privacy Officer
roles.description: Oversees data protection strategy and compliance with privacy regulations like GDPR and the Philippine Data Privacy Act. Manages data breach response and privacy impact assessments.

roles.title: Customer Success Specialist
roles.description: Ensures customers achieve their desired outcomes with the product. Manages onboarding, provides proactive support, and drives product adoption.

roles.title: Customer Experience Manager
roles.description: Designs and optimizes the end-to-end customer experience. Analyzes customer journey touchpoints, identifies pain points, and implements improvements.

roles.title: Support Team Lead
roles.description: Leads a team of customer support agents. Manages escalations, tracks KPIs, coaches team members, and ensures service level targets are met.

roles.title: Content Writer
roles.description: Creates written content for blogs, websites, social media, and marketing materials. Researches topics, optimizes for SEO, and maintains brand voice.

roles.title: Copywriter
roles.description: Writes persuasive copy for advertisements, landing pages, emails, and campaigns. Crafts compelling headlines, CTAs, and brand messaging.

roles.title: Senior Content Strategist
roles.description: Leads content strategy and editorial planning across channels. Manages content teams, develops content frameworks, and measures content performance.

roles.title: Supply Chain Analyst
roles.description: Analyzes supply chain data to optimize logistics, inventory, and procurement. Identifies cost savings, forecasts demand, and improves operational efficiency.

roles.title: Procurement Specialist
roles.description: Manages purchasing processes and vendor relationships. Negotiates contracts, evaluates suppliers, and ensures cost-effective procurement of goods and services.

roles.title: Logistics Coordinator
roles.description: Coordinates the movement of goods from suppliers to customers. Manages shipping schedules, tracks deliveries, and resolves logistics issues.

roles.title: Instructional Designer
roles.description: Designs effective learning experiences and educational materials. Applies instructional design models to create engaging courses for corporate or academic settings.

roles.title: Technical Trainer
roles.description: Delivers technical training programs on software, tools, and systems. Creates training materials, conducts workshops, and assesses learner progress.

roles.title: IT Help Desk Technician
roles.description: Provides first-line technical support to end users. Troubleshoots hardware, software, and network issues, and escalates complex problems as needed.

roles.title: Senior System Administrator
roles.description: Manages complex server infrastructure and enterprise systems. Leads system migrations, capacity planning, and disaster recovery initiatives.

roles.title: IT Director
roles.description: Oversees the entire IT department and technology strategy. Manages budgets, vendor relationships, and technology roadmap aligned with business objectives.
